Monte Carlo (2011)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $23,186,769Details
International Box Office $16,500,000
Worldwide Box Office $39,686,769
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $11,136,843
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $998,050
Total $12,134,893
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Three graduates fulfill their dreams of vacationing in Paris. They accidentally find themselves in a lavish world, where they live like royalty and experience romance. But at the end of their journey, they discover the true magic of friendship.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,453,944 (32.1% of total gross)
Legs:3.11 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:58.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,473 opening theaters/2,473 max. theaters, 3.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $34,970,215

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 1st, 2011 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: February 17th, 2012 (Wide) (Venezuela)
Video Release: October 18th, 2011 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for brief mild language.
(Rating bulletin 2144, 10/27/2010)
Running Time: 109 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Foreign Language
Geographical setting: Monte Carlo
Plot point: Cross-Class Romance, Doppelganger, Dysfunctional Family, Mistaken Identity, Prince/Princess, Romance, Step-Family, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Subgenre: Romantic Comedy
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Fox 2000 Pictures, Regency Enterprises, Di Novi Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Three graduates fulfill their dreams of vacationing in Paris. They accidentally find themselves in a lavish world, where they live like royalty and experience romance. But at the end of their journey, they discover the true magic of friendship.
